    devel/objconv: update to 2.53

     - also check for distfile at (unversioned) upstream
     - while we are at it, disable Portscout
       (due to giving false results)
     - also check for distfile at (unversioned) upstream

    Upstream changes:

     - add disassembler support for AVX512-FP16, etc.
